problem id: 0a195a74
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  11100010 -> 11111001
  11110001 -> 10111100
  00001000 -> 00100100
  01111101 -> 11001010
  11111001 -> 10011000
  10000100 -> 01010010
  00100000 -> 10010000
  11010100 -> 00111010
  00001001 -> 00100000
  01100010 -> 10111001

query: 11001101
predicted answer: 01010010
